feat.name: Fossil Rider
feat.text: Using your ancestors' bones, you manifest their spirits around you in a fossilized form. You can cast *mask of terror* on yourself as an innate spell once per day. When you do, you appear as a skeletal lizardfolk ancestor, twisted in a way that inspires the deepest fears of those who observe you.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.
